channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Joe Manchin calls Democratic Party ‘toxic,’ blames progressives
item.description: Sen. Joe Manchin, I-W.V., blamed progressives for turning the Democratic Party "toxic" as he prepares to retire from the Senate at the end of this term.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What Trump's decision to wade into spending fight tells us about the next 4 years
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After days of threats and demands, Donald Trump had little to show for it once lawmakers passed a budget deal in the early hours of Saturday, narrowly averting a pre-Christmas government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, STEPHEN GROVES, JILL COLVIN and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate confirms 235th Biden judge, surpassing Trump’s record
item.description: The Senate confirmed 234 of Trump’s judicial nominees during his first four years in the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Trump backs MAGA loyalist Joe Gruters for RNC treasurer
item.description: After the 2021 Capitol siege, Gruters, a former chair for the state GOP, was one of 17 state lawmakers who voted to contest President-elect Joe Biden’s Electoral College win.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Trump taps 'Apprentice' producer, Mark Burnett, as special envoy to the United Kingdom
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Mark Burnett, the power producer who helped reintroduce Donald Trump to a national television audience with “The Apprentice,” is being tapped by the president-elect as special envoy to the United Kingdom in his upcoming administration.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate Democrats condemn ethical lapses by Thomas, Supreme Court justices
item.description: Democrats on the Senate Judiciary Committee condemned the Supreme Court for an “ethical crisis of its own making” in a new report released Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominates TV producer, creator of 'The Apprentice,' to serve in new administration
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped Mark Burnett, a TV producer and the creator of "The Apprentice," to serve in a diplomatic role in the United Kingdom.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate review of Supreme Court ethics finds more luxury trips and urges enforceable code of conduct
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A nearly two-year investigation by Democratic senators of Supreme Court ethics details more luxury travel by Justice Clarence Thomas and urges Congress to establish a way to enforce a new code of conduct.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shutdown saga exposes new fault lines for Speaker Johnson and tests his grip on the gavel
item.description: One of the most turbulent sessions of Congress in the modern era is about to make way for the next one.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: President Biden signs stopgap funding bill into law, narrowly averting shutdown
item.description: The White House has announced that President Biden signed a stopgap funding bill into law on Saturday, extending government funding into March and avoiding a shutdown.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden signs bill to avert government shutdown
item.description: After weeks of back and forth, the House and Senate have agreed on a spending deal to avoid a government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: House passes bill to avert government shutdown after whirlwind funding fight
item.description: The House approved legislation to avert a government shutdown hours before the deadline Friday, sending the bill to the Senate for consideration after a whirlwind week on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden and the first lady bring holiday cheer to patients and families at a children's hospital
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden and his wife, Jill, brought some Christmastime cheer to patients and their families at a children's hospital on Friday but a toddler in a light blue jumper entertained, too.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump adds Europe to the list of US trade partners he's threatening with tariffs
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Friday added the 27 countries that make up the European Union to the list of trade partners he's threatening with tariffs — unless the group takes steps to import more U.S. goods.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and RAF CASERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Biden's decline widely reported in final days of presidency
item.description: White House Press Secretary Karine-Jean Pierre is set to face questions regarding a scathing report on Biden's health during his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Democrats pledge to work through Christmas on funding to rebuff Trump’s demands
item.description: Senate Appropriations Committee Chair Patty Murray (D-Wash.) said Friday she’s ready to stay in Washington “through Christmas” to fight off President-elect Trump’s demand to strip negotiated provisions out of a bill to fund the government into 2025.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Johnson says plan C reached to avert shutdown, vote expected
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) said Republicans have arrived at a plan C to avert a shutdown and the House will vote Friday morning on the legislation. "Yeah, yeah, we have a plan," Johnson said Friday morning as he entered the Capitol. "We're expecting votes this morning, so you all stay tuned.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Luna wants disaster aid separate from government funding bill
item.description: Hurricane survivors will need to wait a while longer to see additional disaster relief aid come from Congress.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: House rejects Johnson's plan B to prevent shutdown
item.description: The House on Thursday torpedoed Speaker Mike Johnson’s (R-La.) plan B to avert a government shutdown and suspend the debt limit, dealing a blow to the GOP leader and catapulting the conference back to square one as it stares down Friday's funding deadline.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Shutdown odds rapidly rise as House seeks plan B
item.description: The odds of a shutdown were rapidly growing on Thursday after President-elect Trump upended the talks by urging GOP lawmakers to shutter the government unless Democrats agree to a clean stopgap spending bill that raises or abolishes the debt limit.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Dems say 'hell no' to GOP plan B on government funding, debt ceiling
item.description: House Democrats are rallying in overwhelming opposition to the Republicans' second stab at a government funding bill, vowing to sink it on the House floor and force GOP leaders back to the table to negotiate a bipartisan compromise.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: FAA bans drones in parts of New Jersey
item.description: The FAA warned that "deadly force" could be used against the drones if they pose an "imminent security threat.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota hastens to regulate helium mining after deposit discovery near Babbitt
item.description: Minnesota is scrambling to figure out how to regulate a potential new industry — one discovered by accident — that is both extremely valuable and in demand.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Johnson spending deal throws Speakership into question as floor vote approaches
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson’s handling of an end-of-year spending deal is throwing his grasp on the gavel into uncertain territory ahead of a critical Jan. 3 Speaker vote, as some GOP lawmakers question their support for the Louisiana Republican. Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Fani Willis disqualified as prosecutor on Trump Georgia election case
item.description: A Georgia appeals court booted Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis's (D) office from the 2020 election interference case against President-elect Trump on Thursday due to her relationship with a top prosecutor on the case.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: How much power would RFK Jr. have at HHS? A former health secretary weighs in
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr., is making the case with senators that he should lead Health and Human Services. Kathleen Sebelius, who had the job under Obama, explains the power and limits of the role.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gorenstein, MPR News

item.title: Party switch paying off? Valdes secures committee leadership after joining GOP
item.description: One state Representative in the Tampa Bay area made the controversial move to switch political parties, just last week. The news came was greeted with both cheers and criticisms.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump, Vance call for clean CR, debt ceiling hike, urge GOP to sink Johnson compromise
item.description: President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Vance on Wednesday called for Republicans to approve a clean stopgap funding bill paired with a hike to the debt ceiling, saying the previous government-funding measure negotiated by Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) should be torpedoed.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Senate passes defense bill that will raise troop pay and aims to counter China's power
item.description: The Senate has passed a defense bill that authorize significant pay raises for junior enlisted service members and boost overall military spending to $895 billion. It also strips coverage of transgender medical treatments for children of military members.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: In last-ditch effort, Democrats push to get Julie Su confirmed as labor secretary
item.description: Acting Secretary Julie Su has led the Labor Department for nearly two years, despite never getting a Senate confirmation vote. With time running out, her staunchest supporters haven't given up.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu, MPR News

item.title: Trump tariff plan threatens to drive up gas prices
item.description: Trump said that on his first day in office, he would place 25 percent tariffs on all Canadian and Mexican goods. The two countries are the leading sources of U.S. oil imports.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: McConnell urges Trump to reject isolationism
item.description: Outgoing Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) is calling on President-elect Trump to reject isolationists in the Republican Party who will argue for the United States to focus on China at the expense of Ukraine and other areas of the world.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Speaker Johnson faces 'complicated' decision on crucial Rules Committee chair
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is barreling into a tricky — yet critical — decision over whom to appoint as the next chair of the House Rules Committee, a post that will set the tone for legislating and play a key role in keeping Republicans united in next year’s ultrathin majority.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, Fox 5
